properties.query:
AzureActivity
| where OperationNameValue contains "create" 
| where ActivityStatusValue == "Success"
| extend Temp = split(_ResourceId, "/")
| extend Deleted_Resource = Temp[-1]
| extend Deleted_ResourceType = Temp[-2]
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, CallerIpAddress, Deleted_Resource, Deleted_ResourceType, ResourceGroup, _ResourceId, OperationNameValue
| order by TimeGenerated desc
